<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>ISG BPA: Business Planning and Analytics</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@tabler/icons-webfont@3.19.0/dist/tabler-icons.min.css">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.js"></script>
  <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/xlsx/0.18.5/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
  <style>
    :root {
      --bg:          #f0f3fc;
      --surface:     #ffffff;
      --card:        #ffffff;
      --card-hi:     #eef1fc;
      --border:      #dde2f4;
      --border-hi:   #b4bde8;
      --text-1:      #0d1020;
      --text-2:      #5a6280;
      --text-3:      #9099be;
      --accent:      #3a6ef0;
      --accent-glow: rgba(58,110,240,0.12);
      --accent-dim:  rgba(58,110,240,0.07);
      --blue:        #3a6ef0;
      --blue-dim:    rgba(58,110,240,0.07);
      --green:       #16a34a;
      --green-dim:   rgba(22,163,74,0.09);
      --red:         #dc2626;
      --red-dim:     rgba(220,38,38,0.09);
      --amber:       #b45309;
      --amber-dim:   rgba(180,83,9,0.09);
      --purple:      #6d28d9;
      --nav-bg:      #ffffff;
      --nav-hover:   #eef1fc;
      --font-ui:     'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
      --font-mono:   'IBM Plex Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;
    }

    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html, body { height: 100%; }
    body {
      background: var(--bg);
      color: var(--text-1);
      font-family: var(--font-ui);
      font-size: 14px;
      line-height: 1.5;
      overflow: hidden;
      -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
      transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s;
    }
    /* Uniform theme transition across all structural surfaces */
    .left-panel, .right-panel, .dash-header, .home-status-bar,
    .home-hero, .tiles-section, .kpi-card, .visual-card, .tile,
    .accordion-header, .nav-link, .btn-icon, .btn-sm,
    .filter-dropdown-btn, .filter-dropdown-content, .filter-checkbox,
    .filter-header, .filter-search-input, .table-search,
    .data-table th, .data-table td, .channel-tab,
    .chip, .badge, .sev-btn, .export-btn, .reset-btn,
    .page-row, .home-banner, .home-hero::before {
      transition: background 0.3s, background-color 0.3s,
                  border-color 0.3s, color 0.3s;
    }

    /* ── VIEWS ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    #home-view      { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; overflow-y: auto; }
    #dashboard-view { display: none; height: 100vh; flex-direction: column; }

    /* ── HOME: TOP STATUS BAR ──────────────────────────────── */
    .home-status-bar {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      padding: 9px 36px;
      background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-2);
      letter-spacing: 0.04em; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .pulse-dot {
      width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--green); flex-shrink: 0;
      animation: pulse-ring 2.2s ease-out infinite;
    }
    @keyframes pulse-ring {
      0%   { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(34,212,114,0.55); }
      70%  { box-shadow: 0 0 0 8px rgba(34,212,114,0); }
      100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(34,212,114,0); }
    }
    .status-live { color: var(--green); font-weight: 700; }
    .status-sep  { color: var(--border-hi); margin: 0 3px; }

    /* ── HOME: HERO ────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .home-hero {
      position: relative; padding: 60px 36px 48px;
      overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .home-hero::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      background-image: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(76,126,248,0.07) 1px, transparent 1px);
      background-size: 28px 28px;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .home-hero::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; top: -100px; right: -100px;
      width: 520px; height: 520px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(76,126,248,0.07) 0%, transparent 65%);
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    .home-hero-inner { position: relative; z-index: 1; max-width: 700px; }
    .home-eyebrow {
      font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 18px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    }
    .home-eyebrow::before {
      content: ''; display: block;
      width: 22px; height: 2px;
      background: var(--accent); border-radius: 2px;
    }
    .home-title {
      font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 5vw, 4rem);
      font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.05;
      letter-spacing: -0.03em; color: var(--text-1);
      margin-bottom: 6px;
    }
    .home-title-sub {
      font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2.2vw, 1.7rem);
      font-weight: 300; color: var(--text-2);
      letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin-bottom: 22px;
    }
    .home-desc {
      font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-2);
      line-height: 1.75; max-width: 540px;
    }
    .home-logo { position: absolute; top: 28px; right: 36px; z-index: 1; }

    /* ── HOME: MODULE TILES ────────────────────────────────── */
    .tiles-section { padding: 0 36px 48px; }
    .tiles-label {
      font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-3); margin-bottom: 14px; padding-top: 4px;
    }
    .tiles-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(270px, 1fr));
      gap: 14px;
    }
    .tile {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 14px; padding: 22px 20px;
      cursor: pointer; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      transition: border-color 0.2s, transform 0.18s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    }
    .tile::before {
      content: ''; position: absolute;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), transparent);
      opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s;
    }
    .tile:hover { border-color: var(--border-hi); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); }
    .tile:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
    .tile-head { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .tile-icon {
      width: 40px; height: 40px;
      background: var(--accent-dim);
      border: 1px solid rgba(76,126,248,0.18);
      border-radius: 10px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      font-size: 18px; color: var(--accent);
    }
    .tile-arrow { color: var(--text-3); font-size: 16px; transition: color 0.2s, transform 0.2s; }
    .tile:hover .tile-arrow { color: var(--accent); transform: translate(2px,-2px); }
    .tile-title { font-size: 0.97rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-1); margin-bottom: 6px; }
    .tile-desc { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-2); line-height: 1.6; }
    .tile-stat {
      margin-top: 16px; padding-top: 14px;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3);
    }
    .tile-stat span { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 600; }

    /* ── DASHBOARD HEADER ──────────────────────────────────── */
    .dash-header {
      height: 54px; background: var(--surface);
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex; align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 0 16px; flex-shrink: 0; gap: 12px;
    }
    .header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; min-width: 0; }
    .header-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .header-brand { font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-1); white-space: nowrap; }
    .breadcrumb { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-2); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
    .breadcrumb span { cursor: pointer; }
    .breadcrumb span:hover { color: var(--accent); }
    .breadcrumb .sep { color: var(--border-hi); }
    .header-stamp { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3); font-family: var(--font-mono); }
    .ctx-badge {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
      padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px;
      background: var(--accent-dim);
      border: 1px solid rgba(76,126,248,0.2);
      font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent); white-space: nowrap;
    }
    .btn-icon {
      width: 32px; height: 32px; background: transparent;
      border: 1px solid transparent; color: var(--text-2);
      cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 8px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .btn-icon:hover { background: var(--card); border-color: var(--border); color: var(--text-1); }
    .btn-sm {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text-2); cursor: pointer; font-size: 11px;
      padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 6px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      font-family: var(--font-ui); transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .btn-sm:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }

    /* ── LAYOUT ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .dash-body { display: flex; flex: 1; overflow: hidden; }

    /* ── LEFT NAV ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .left-panel {
      width: 220px; background: var(--nav-bg);
      border-right: 1px solid var(--border); flex-shrink: 0;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      transition: width 0.25s ease; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .left-panel.collapsed { width: 0; border: none; }
    .accordion-header {
      padding: 14px 16px; cursor: pointer;
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
      font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-3); white-space: nowrap;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .accordion-header:hover { color: var(--text-2); }
    .accordion-content { display: none; padding: 6px 0; }
    .accordion-content.active { display: block; }
    .nav-link {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
      padding: 9px 16px; color: var(--text-2);
      text-decoration: none; font-size: 13px;
      cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap;
      border-left: 2px solid transparent;
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .nav-link:hover { color: var(--text-1); background: var(--nav-hover); }
    .nav-link.active { color: var(--text-1); background: var(--nav-hover); border-left-color: var(--accent); }

    /* ── MAIN CONTENT ──────────────────────────────────────── */
    .main-content {
      flex: 1; padding: 18px 22px;
      overflow-y: auto; background: var(--bg);
      display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; min-width: 0;
    }

    /* Filter chips */
    .filter-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .chip {
      display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      background: var(--accent-dim);
      border: 1px solid rgba(76,126,248,0.3);
      border-radius: 20px; padding: 3px 10px 3px 8px;
      font-size: 11px; color: var(--accent);
      cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .chip:hover { background: var(--red-dim); border-color: var(--red); color: var(--red); }

    /* Channel tabs */
    .channel-tabs {
      display: flex; gap: 0; margin-bottom: 18px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .channel-tab {
      padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
      cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-2);
      border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; margin-bottom: -1px;
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .channel-tab.active { color: var(--accent); border-bottom-color: var(--accent); }
    .channel-tab:hover { color: var(--text-1); }

    /* Sections */
    .module-section { display: none; }
    .module-section.active { display: block; }
    .page-section { display: none; }
    .page-section.active { display: block; animation: fadeIn 0.2s ease; }
    @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(5px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

    /* ── KPI CARDS ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .kpi-row {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
      gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .kpi-card {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 12px; padding: 18px 18px 14px;
      position: relative; overflow: hidden;
      transition: border-color 0.2s;
    }
    .kpi-card:hover { border-color: var(--border-hi); }
    .kpi-card::after {
      content: ''; position: absolute;
      bottom: 0; left: 18px; right: 18px; height: 1px;
      background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), transparent);
      opacity: 0.2;
    }
    .kpi-label {
      font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-2); margin-bottom: 10px;
    }
    .kpi-value {
      font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 26px; font-weight: 600;
      letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: var(--text-1); line-height: 1;
    }
    .kpi-sub {
      font-size: 11px; margin-top: 8px;
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; color: var(--text-2);
    }

    /* ── CHART CARDS ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    .visual-row {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(360px, 1fr));
      gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .visual-card {
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px 18px;
      min-height: 280px; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    }
    .visual-title {
      font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-1);
      margin-bottom: 14px; padding-bottom: 12px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    }
    .chart-toggle { display: flex; gap: 4px; }
    .chart-toggle-btn {
      background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text-2); font-size: 10px; padding: 3px 9px;
      border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-ui);
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .chart-toggle-btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }
    .chart-toggle-btn.active { background: var(--accent-dim); border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); font-weight: 700; }

    /* ── TABLES ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .table-wrap { overflow: auto; flex: 1; }
    table.data-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 12px; }
    .data-table th {
      background: var(--surface); color: var(--text-2);
      padding: 9px 12px; text-align: left;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); white-space: nowrap;
      position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 1;
      cursor: pointer; user-select: none;
      font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    .data-table th:hover { color: var(--text-1); }
    .data-table th .sort-icon { margin-left: 4px; opacity: 0.4; font-size: 10px; }
    .data-table th.sort-asc .sort-icon::before { content: '▲'; opacity: 1; }
    .data-table th.sort-desc .sort-icon::before { content: '▼'; opacity: 1; }
    .data-table td {
      padding: 9px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      white-space: nowrap; color: var(--text-1);
    }
    .data-table tr:hover td { background: var(--card-hi); }
    .data-table .row-num {
      color: var(--text-3); font-family: var(--font-mono);
      font-size: 10px; text-align: right; padding-right: 12px;
    }
    .table-toolbar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .table-search {
      padding: 8px 14px; background: var(--surface);
      border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px;
      color: var(--text-1); font-size: 12px; font-family: var(--font-ui);
      outline: none; min-width: 240px; transition: border-color 0.15s;
    }
    .table-search:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }
    .table-search::placeholder { color: var(--text-3); }
    .row-count { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-2); margin-left: auto; font-family: var(--font-mono); }
    .export-btns { display: flex; gap: 6px; }
    .export-btn {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
      padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 7px;
      font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid;
      font-family: var(--font-ui); transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .export-btn.csv  { background: var(--green-dim); color: var(--green); border-color: rgba(34,212,114,0.3); }
    .export-btn.csv:hover  { background: var(--green); color: #000; }
    .export-btn.excel { background: var(--accent-dim); color: var(--accent); border-color: rgba(76,126,248,0.3); }
    .export-btn.excel:hover { background: var(--accent); color: white; }

    /* ── RIGHT PANEL ───────────────────────────────────────── */
    .right-panel {
      width: 258px; background: var(--surface);
      border-left: 1px solid var(--border); flex-shrink: 0;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      transition: width 0.25s ease; overflow: hidden;
    }
    .right-panel.collapsed { width: 0; border: none; }
    .filter-header {
      padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-2);
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .filter-search-box { padding: 10px 12px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .filter-search-input {
      width: 100%; padding: 7px 12px;
      background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: 7px; color: var(--text-1);
      font-family: var(--font-ui); outline: none; font-size: 12px;
      transition: border-color 0.15s;
    }
    .filter-search-input:focus { border-color: var(--accent); }
    .filter-list { overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; padding: 4px 12px 8px; }
    .filter-footer { padding: 10px 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); flex-shrink: 0; }
    .reset-btn {
      width: 100%; padding: 8px;
      background: var(--red-dim); border: 1px solid rgba(240,96,96,0.3);
      border-radius: 7px; color: var(--red); cursor: pointer;
      font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--font-ui);
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px;
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .reset-btn:hover { background: var(--red); color: white; }
    .filter-dropdown { margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .filter-dropdown-btn {
      width: 100%; text-align: left; background: transparent;
      border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 8px 10px; border-radius: 7px;
      color: var(--text-1); cursor: pointer;
      display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
      font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--font-ui);
      transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .filter-dropdown-btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
    .filter-dropdown-content {
      display: none; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-top: none;
      background: var(--card); padding: 8px; border-radius: 0 0 7px 7px;
      max-height: 140px; overflow-y: auto;
    }
    .filter-dropdown-content.open { display: block; }
    .filter-checkbox {
      display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 5px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-2);
      transition: color 0.15s;
    }
    .filter-checkbox:hover { color: var(--text-1); }
    .filter-checkbox input { cursor: pointer; accent-color: var(--accent); }
    .inner-search {
      width: 100%; padding: 5px 8px; font-size: 11px; margin-bottom: 6px;
      background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border);
      color: var(--text-1); border-radius: 4px; outline: none; font-family: var(--font-ui);
    }

    /* ── BADGES ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .badge-high   { background: var(--red-dim);   color: var(--red); }
    .badge-good   { background: var(--green-dim);  color: var(--green); }
    .badge-med    { background: var(--amber-dim);  color: var(--amber); }
    .badge-accent { background: var(--accent-dim); color: var(--accent); }

    /* Severity filter */
    .severity-filter { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .sev-btn {
      padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid;
      font-family: var(--font-ui); transition: all 0.15s;
    }
    .sev-btn.all    { border-color: var(--border); color: var(--text-2); background: transparent; }
    .sev-btn.all.active  { background: var(--card); color: var(--text-1); border-color: var(--border-hi); }
    .sev-btn.high   { border-color: rgba(240,96,96,0.4); color: var(--red); background: var(--red-dim); }
    .sev-btn.high.active { background: var(--red); color: white; }
    .sev-btn.medium { border-color: rgba(240,168,48,0.4); color: var(--amber); background: var(--amber-dim); }
    .sev-btn.medium.active { background: var(--amber); color: white; }
    .sev-btn.low    { border-color: rgba(34,212,114,0.4); color: var(--green); background: var(--green-dim); }
    .sev-btn.low.active   { background: var(--green); color: #000; }

    /* Sticky col */
    .sticky-col { position: sticky; left: 0; background: var(--card); z-index: 1; }
    .data-table tr:hover .sticky-col { background: var(--card-hi); }

    /* Scrollbars */
    ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 5px; height: 5px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border); border-radius: 3px; }
    ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: var(--border-hi); }

    hr.rule { border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); margin: 4px 0; }
  </style>
</head>

<script>
// =========================================================
// DATA GENERATION
// =========================================================
const REGIONS = ['AMER','AMER','EMEA','APJ'];
const SUBREGIONS = {
  'AMER': ['North America','LATAM'],
  'EMEA': ['Western Europe','Eastern Europe'],
  'APJ': ['SEA','ANZ','Japan']
};
const PARTNERS = ['Dell','OSP'];
const LOCATIONS = ['New York Hub','London HQ','Tokyo Base','Austin DC','Sydney Office','Paris HQ'];
const QUEUES = ['Queue_Alpha','Queue_Beta','Queue_Delta'];
const BRS = ['BR_Direct','BR_Indirect'];
const LOBS = ['Field Services','Remote Support','Managed Services','Care'];

function randInt(min, max) { return Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min; }
function randFrom(arr) { return arr[Math.floor(Math.random() * arr.length)]; }
function randFloat(min, max, dec=1) { return parseFloat((Math.random() * (max - min) + min).toFixed(dec)); }

let rawData = [];
function generateRawData() {
  rawData = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < 150; i++) {
    const region = randFrom(REGIONS);
    const subregion = randFrom(SUBREGIONS[region]);
    const partner = randFrom(PARTNERS);
    const location = randFrom(LOCATIONS);
    const queue = randFrom(QUEUES);
    const br = randFrom(BRS);
    const r2 = Math.random();
    const fy = r2 > 0.55 ? 'FY26' : r2 > 0.25 ? 'FY27' : 'FY25';
    const quarter = randFrom(['Q1','Q2','Q3','Q4']);
    const month = randFrom(['M1','M2','M3','M4','M5','M6']);
    const weekNum = randInt(1, 52);
    const week = `W${weekNum}`;
    const sr = randInt(1000, 8000);
    const fasu = randInt(2000, 12000);
    const tasu = randInt(500, 6000);
    const fdsr = randInt(1000, 9000);
    const lob = randFrom(LOBS);
    const diff = Math.abs(sr - fdsr);
    const pct = diff / fdsr;
    const status = pct < 0.1 ? 'Within Tolerance' : 'Out of Bounds';
    rawData.push({ i: i+1, region, subregion, partner, location, queue, br, fy, quarter, month, week, weekNum, sr, fasu, tasu, fdsr, lob, status });
  }
}
generateRawData();

const ALERTS_DATA = [
  { sev:'High', desc:'ASU variance exceeds 10% tolerance threshold', date:'2026-06-02', region:'AMER', subregion:'North America' },
  { sev:'High', desc:'Missing data for LOB: Field Services W44', date:'2026-06-03', region:'EMEA', subregion:'Western Europe' },
  { sev:'High', desc:'Forecast demand drop >15% for Care queue — APJ', date:'2026-06-03', region:'APJ', subregion:'SEA' },
  { sev:'High', desc:'Tech ASU weekly actuals below threshold — W22', date:'2026-06-01', region:'AMER', subregion:'LATAM' },
  { sev:'High', desc:'Partner SLA breach — OSP dispatch >48hr', date:'2026-06-04', region:'EMEA', subregion:'Eastern Europe' },
  { sev:'Medium', desc:'Partner Dell SLA missed warning', date:'2026-06-01', region:'APJ', subregion:'ANZ' },
  { sev:'Medium', desc:'Data completeness dropped to 94% — Austin DC', date:'2026-06-02', region:'AMER', subregion:'North America' },
  { sev:'Medium', desc:'Queue_Beta backlog growing — 3 consecutive weeks', date:'2026-06-03', region:'EMEA', subregion:'Western Europe' },
  { sev:'Medium', desc:'MDR >8% sustained for Tokyo Base — review needed', date:'2026-05-30', region:'APJ', subregion:'Japan' },
  { sev:'Low', desc:'Forecast model retrain scheduled — W26', date:'2026-06-01', region:'AMER', subregion:'North America' },
  { sev:'Low', desc:'Minor duplicate records detected — 43 rows', date:'2026-05-29', region:'EMEA', subregion:'Eastern Europe' },
  { sev:'Low', desc:'New York Hub location data lag — 2hr delay observed', date:'2026-06-04', region:'AMER', subregion:'North America' },
];

// =========================================================
// THEME
// =========================================================
let isDark = false;
function updateChartTheme(chart) {
  const grid  = isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)';
  const ticks = isDark ? '#6b758f' : '#5a6280';
  if (!chart.options.scales) return;
  Object.values(chart.options.scales).forEach(s => {
    if (s.grid)  s.grid.color  = grid;
    if (s.ticks) s.ticks.color = ticks;
  });
}

// =========================================================
// MODULE CONFIG
// =========================================================
const modules = {
  'data-raw': { title: 'Data Raw', pages: [{ id: 'dr-page-raw', label: 'Full Raw View' }] },
  'demand-profiling': { title: 'Demand Profiling', pages: [{ id: 'dp-page-overview', label: 'Profiling Overview' }] },
  'forecast-accuracy': { title: 'Forecast Accuracy', pages: [
    { id: 'fa-page-overview', label: 'Forecast Overview' },
    { id: 'fa-page-actuals', label: 'Weekly Actuals & Metrics' },
    { id: 'fa-page-partner', label: 'Location & Partner View' }
  ]},
  'demand-alerts': { title: 'Demand Planning Alerts', pages: [{ id: 'da-page-log', label: 'Alerts Log' }] },
  'whatif': { title: 'What-If Simulation', pages: [
    { id: 'wi-page-sim',       label: 'Simulation Controls' },
    { id: 'wi-page-scenarios', label: 'Scenario Playground' },
    { id: 'wi-page-publish',   label: 'Forecast Publish' }
  ]}
};

let activeModule = '';
let activePageLabel = '';

function openDashboard(moduleId) {
  activeModule = moduleId;
  document.getElementById('home-view').style.display = 'none';
  const dv = document.getElementById('dashboard-view');
  dv.style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('dash-title').innerText = modules[moduleId].title;
  document.getElementById('bc-module').innerText = modules[moduleId].title;

  document.querySelectorAll('.module-section').forEach(m => m.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('module-' + moduleId).classList.add('active');

  const navContainer = document.getElementById('left-nav-links');
  navContainer.innerHTML = '';
  modules[moduleId].pages.forEach((page, idx) => {
    const link = document.createElement('div');
    link.className = 'nav-link' + (idx === 0 ? ' active' : '');
    link.innerText = page.label;
    link.onclick = () => switchPage(page.id, link, moduleId, page.label);
    navContainer.appendChild(link);
  });

  if (modules[moduleId].pages.length > 0) {
    const first = modules[moduleId].pages[0];
    switchPage(first.id, navContainer.firstChild, moduleId, first.label);
  }

  updateFilterChips();
  if (moduleId === 'whatif') { setTimeout(wiInit, 80); }
  else { setTimeout(initCharts, 80); }
}

function goHome() {
  document.getElementById('dashboard-view').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('home-view').style.display = 'flex';
}

function switchPage(pageId, linkEl, moduleId, label) {
  const moduleEl = document.getElementById('module-' + moduleId);
  moduleEl.querySelectorAll('.page-section').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('left-nav-links').querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(pageId).classList.add('active');
  linkEl.classList.add('active');
  activePageLabel = label;

  const bcPage = document.getElementById('bc-page');
  const bcSep = document.querySelector('.bc-page-sep');
  bcPage.innerText = label;
  bcSep.style.display = 'inline';

  if (pageId === 'dr-page-raw') renderRawTable();
  if (pageId === 'da-page-log') renderAlerts('all');
  if (pageId === 'fa-page-actuals') generateActualsTable();
  if (pageId === 'fa-page-partner') generatePartnerTable();
  if (pageId === 'wi-page-sim')       { setTimeout(wiRenderAll, 60); }
  if (pageId === 'wi-page-scenarios') { wiRenderAIInsights(); wiRenderScenarios(); }
  if (pageId === 'wi-page-publish')   { wiRenderPublishReadiness(); wiRenderAudit(); }
}

// =========================================================
// PANEL TOGGLES
// =========================================================
function toggleLeftPanel() { document.getElementById('left-panel').classList.toggle('collapsed'); }
function toggleRightPanel() { document.getElementById('right-panel').classList.toggle('collapsed'); }
function toggleAccordion(el) {
  const content = el.nextElementSibling;
  const icon = el.querySelector('i');
  content.classList.toggle('active');
  icon.className = content.classList.contains('active') ? 'ti ti-chevron-up' : 'ti ti-chevron-down';
}
function toggleDropdown(btn) {
  btn.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle('open');
  const icon = btn.querySelector('i');
  icon.className = btn.nextElementSibling.classList.contains('open') ? 'ti ti-chevron-up' : 'ti ti-chevron-down';
}

// =========================================================
// FILTER INNER SEARCH
// =========================================================
function filterInner(input) {
  const q = input.value.toUpperCase();
  const labels = input.nextElementSibling.querySelectorAll('label');
  labels.forEach(l => l.style.display = l.textContent.toUpperCase().includes(q) ? '' : 'none');
}
function searchFilters(input) {
  const q = input.value.toUpperCase();
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-dropdown').forEach(dd => {
    const label = dd.querySelector('.filter-dropdown-btn span').textContent.toUpperCase();
    dd.style.display = label.includes(q) ? '' : 'none';
  });
}

// =========================================================
// WEEK CHECKBOXES
// =========================================================
const weekList = document.getElementById('week-check-list');
let wHtml = '<label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="week" value="All" checked onchange="onFilterChange()"> (All)</label>';
for (let i = 1; i <= 52; i++) {
  wHtml += `<label class="filter-checkbox"><input type="checkbox" data-group="week" value="W${i}" onchange="onFilterChange()"> W${i}</label>`;
}
weekList.innerHTML = wHtml;

// =========================================================
// FILTER DEFAULTS
// =========================================================
const DEFAULT_FILTER_STATES = {};
function captureDefaults() {
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[type=checkbox]').forEach(cb => {
    const key = (cb.dataset.group || '') + '::' + (cb.value || '');
    DEFAULT_FILTER_STATES[key] = cb.checked;
  });
}
setTimeout(captureDefaults, 100);

function resetFilters() {
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[type=checkbox]').forEach(cb => {
    const key = (cb.dataset.group || '') + '::' + (cb.value || '');
    if (key in DEFAULT_FILTER_STATES) cb.checked = DEFAULT_FILTER_STATES[key];
    else cb.checked = false;
  });
  document.getElementById('global-context').innerText = 'FY26 · All Regions';
  updateFilterChips();
  triggerDataUpdate();
}

// =========================================================
// FILTER CHIPS
// =========================================================
function getActiveFilters() {
  const groupState = {};
  document.querySelectorAll('#filter-container input[type=checkbox]').forEach(cb => {
    const group = cb.dataset.group;
    if (!group) return;
    if (!groupState[group]) groupState[group] = { allChecked: false, values: [] };
    if (cb.value === 'All') { if (cb.checked) groupState[group].allChecked = true; }
    else if (cb.checked) groupState[group].values.push(cb.value);
  });
  const active = {};
  Object.entries(groupState).forEach(([group, state]) => {
    if (!state.allChecked) active[group] = state.values;
  });
  return active;
}

function updateFilterChips() {
  const row = document.getElementById('filter-chips-row');
  row.innerHTML = '';
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  Object.entries(active).forEach(([group, values]) => {
    values.forEach(v => {
      const chip = document.createElement('div');
      chip.className = 'chip';
      chip.innerHTML = `<i class="ti ti-x" style="font-size:9px;"></i> ${group}: ${v}`;
      chip.title = 'Click to remove';
      chip.onclick = () => {
        const cb = document.querySelector(`#filter-container input[data-group="${group}"][value="${v}"]`);
        if (cb) { cb.checked = false; onFilterChange(); }
      };
      row.appendChild(chip);
    });
  });
  const fyChecked = [...document.querySelectorAll('input[data-group="fy"]:checked')].map(c=>c.value);
  const regionChecked = [...document.querySelectorAll('input[data-group="region"]:checked')].map(c=>c.value);
  const fyText = fyChecked.length ? fyChecked.join(', ') : 'All FY';
  const regionText = regionChecked.length ? regionChecked.join(', ') : 'All Regions';
  document.getElementById('global-context').innerText = `${fyText} · ${regionText}`;
}

function onFilterChange() {
  updateFilterChips();
  triggerDataUpdate();
}

// =========================================================
// DATA UPDATE
// =========================================================
const FILTER_AWARE_CHARTS = new Set([
  'fa-chart-hbar','fa-chart-partner',
  'dp-chart-overall-region','dp-chart-overall-qoq','dp-chart-overall-mom','dp-chart-overall-wow',
  'dp-chart-field-region','dp-chart-field-qoq','dp-chart-field-mom','dp-chart-field-wow',
  'dp-chart-care-region','dp-chart-care-qoq','dp-chart-care-mom','dp-chart-care-wow',
  'care-cf-region','care-cf-qoq','care-cf-mom','care-cf-wow',
  'care-apos-region','care-apos-qoq','care-apos-mom','care-apos-wow',
  'care-sr-region','care-sr-qoq','care-sr-mom','care-sr-wow',
  'care-dsp-region','care-dsp-qoq','care-dsp-mom','care-dsp-wow'
]);

function triggerDataUpdate() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.kpi-dynamic:not(#dr-total-records):not(#da-total)').forEach(el => {
    let t = el.innerText;
    let isP = t.includes('%'), isK = t.includes('K');
    let n = parseFloat(t.replace(/[^0-9.]/g,''));
    let v = n * (1 + (Math.random() * 0.2 - 0.1));
    el.innerText = isP ? v.toFixed(1)+'%' : isK ? v.toFixed(1)+'K' : Math.round(v).toLocaleString();
  });
  if (activeModule === 'data-raw') renderRawTable();
  if (activeModule === 'demand-alerts') renderAlerts(currentAlertFilter);
  if (activeModule === 'forecast-accuracy') { generateActualsTable(); generatePartnerTable(); }
  Object.entries(chartInstances).forEach(([id, c]) => {
    if (!c || FILTER_AWARE_CHARTS.has(id)) return;
    c.data.datasets.forEach(ds => {
      ds.data = ds.data.map(v => Math.max(10, v * (1 + (Math.random() * 0.3 - 0.15))));
    });
    c.update();
  });
  applyAllFilteredCharts();
}

// =========================================================
// CHARTS
// =========================================================
Chart.defaults.color = '#5a6280';
Chart.defaults.font.family = "'Plus Jakarta Sans', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif";
const chartInstances = {};

function gridColor() { return isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)'; }
function axisColor() { return isDark ? '#6b758f' : '#5a6280'; }

function baseLineOptions(stacked = false) {
  return {
    responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: axisColor(), boxWidth: 12, font: { size: 11 } } } },
    scales: {
      x: { stacked, grid: { color: gridColor() }, ticks: { color: axisColor(), font: { size: 11 } } },
      y: { stacked, grid: { color: gridColor() }, ticks: { color: axisColor(), font: { size: 11 } } }
    }
  };
}

function switchChartType(chartId, newType, btnEl) {
  const chart = chartInstances[chartId];
  if (!chart) return;
  chart.config.type = newType;
  chart.update();
  btnEl.closest('.chart-toggle').querySelectorAll('.chart-toggle-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btnEl.classList.add('active');
}

function initCharts() {
  Object.values(chartInstances).forEach(c => { if (c) c.destroy(); });
  Object.keys(chartInstances).forEach(k => delete chartInstances[k]);

  function mk(id, type, data, options) {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;
    chartInstances[id] = new Chart(el.getContext('2d'), { type, data, options: options || baseLineOptions() });
  }

  mk('fa-chart-overview', 'line', {
    labels: ['W1','W2','W3','W4','W5','W6','W7','W8'],
    datasets: [
      { label: 'Forecast Tech ASU', data: [120,135,125,145,155,140,160,150], borderColor: '#4c7ef8', backgroundColor: 'rgba(76,126,248,0.07)', tension: 0.4, fill: true },
      { label: 'Forecast Work Orders', data: [80,90,85,95,100,90,105,98], borderColor: '#22d472', backgroundColor: 'rgba(34,212,114,0.05)', tension: 0.4, fill: true }
    ]
  });
  mk('fa-chart-hbar', 'bar', {
    labels: ['AMER','EMEA','APJ'],
    datasets: [
      { label: 'Weekly Actuals', data: [450,300,250], backgroundColor: '#4c7ef8' },
      { label: 'Forecast Demand', data: [420,310,230], backgroundColor: '#22d472' }
    ]
  });
  mk('fa-chart-partner', 'bar', {
    labels: ['Dell','OSP'],
    datasets: [{ label: 'MDR Work Orders', data: [1200,850], backgroundColor: ['#4c7ef8','#22d472'] }]
  }, { ...baseLineOptions(), indexAxis: 'y' });

  // Overall tab — Region Wise
  mk('dp-chart-overall-region', 'bar', {
    labels: ['AMER','EMEA','APJ'],
    datasets: [
      { label: 'ISG Forecast', data: [4500,3100,2500], backgroundColor: '#3a6ef0' },
      { label: 'Actuals',      data: [4284,2945,2376], backgroundColor: '#16a34a' }
    ]
  });

  // Overall tab — QoQ
  mk('dp-chart-overall-qoq', 'bar', {
    labels: ['Q1','Q2','Q3','Q4'],
    datasets: [
      { label: 'ISG Forecast', data: DP_OVERALL_QOQ_BASE.forecast, backgroundColor: 'rgba(58,110,240,0.75)' },
      { label: 'Actuals',      data: DP_OVERALL_QOQ_BASE.actuals,  backgroundColor: 'rgba(22,163,74,0.75)' }
    ]
  });

  // Overall tab — MoM
  mk('dp-chart-overall-mom', 'line', {
    labels: ['M1','M2','M3','M4','M5','M6'],

const Q_WEEKS = {
  Q1: Array.from({length: 13}, (_, i) => i + 1),
  Q2: Array.from({length: 13}, (_, i) => i + 14),
  Q3: Array.from({length: 13}, (_, i) => i + 27),
  Q4: Array.from({length: 13}, (_, i) => i + 40),
};
const M_WEEKS = {
  M1: [1,2,3,4], M2: [5,6,7,8], M3: [9,10,11,12,13],
  M4: [14,15,16,17], M5: [18,19,20,21,22], M6: [23,24,25,26],
};
const FY_SCALE = { FY25: 0.92, FY26: 1.0, FY27: 1.08 };

function _makeTrend(base, amp, phase) {
  return Array.from({length: 52}, (_, i) =>
    Math.max(10, Math.round(base + amp * Math.sin(2 * Math.PI * (i + (phase || 0)) / 13)))
  );
}
const TREND_DATA_52 = {
  'fa-asu':          _makeTrend(140,  20, 0),
  'fa-wo':           _makeTrend(90,   12, 0),
  'dp-ov-fs':        _makeTrend(540,  60, 0),
  'dp-ov-care':      _makeTrend(420,  45, 2),
  'dp-ov-ms':        _makeTrend(215,  25, 4),
  'dp-ov-forecast':  _makeTrend(1175, 130, 0),
  'dp-ov-actuals':   _makeTrend(1115, 125, 0),
  'dp-fld-dis':      _makeTrend(660,  70, 1),
  'dp-fld-fct':      _makeTrend(650,  65, 1),
  'dp-care-forecast':_makeTrend(1080, 107, 2),
  'dp-care-actuals': _makeTrend(1025, 102, 2),
  'care-cf-fct':     _makeTrend( 950,  95, 1),
  'care-cf-act':     _makeTrend( 900,  90, 1),
  'care-apos-fct':   _makeTrend( 420,  42, 3),
  'care-apos-act':   _makeTrend( 399,  40, 3),
  'care-sr-fct':     _makeTrend( 680,  68, 2),

  'care-dsp-fct':    _makeTrend( 520,  52, 4),
  'care-dsp-act':    _makeTrend( 494,  49, 4),
  'dp-care-amer':    _makeTrend(510,  50, 0),

  'dp-care-apj':     _makeTrend(220,  22, 6),
};

function getSelectedWeekIndices() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  let idx = Array.from({length: 52}, (_, i) => i);
  if (active.quarter !== undefined) {
    if (active.quarter.length === 0) return [];
    const qNums = active.quarter.flatMap(q => Q_WEEKS[q] || []);
    idx = idx.filter(i => qNums.includes(i + 1));
  }
  if (active.month !== undefined) {
    if (active.month.length === 0) return [];
    const mNums = active.month.flatMap(m => M_WEEKS[m] || []);
    if (mNums.length) idx = idx.filter(i => mNums.includes(i + 1));
  }
  if (active.week !== undefined) {
    if (active.week.length === 0) return [];
    const wNums = active.week.map(w => parseInt(w.slice(1)));
    idx = idx.filter(i => wNums.includes(i + 1));
  }
  return idx;
}

function getActiveFYMultiplier() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  const fys = active.fy;
  if (fys === undefined) return (FY_SCALE.FY26 + FY_SCALE.FY27) / 2;
  if (fys.length === 0)  return 0;
  return fys.reduce((s, f) => s + (FY_SCALE[f] || 1.0), 0) / fys.length;
}

function _filterByRegion(data) {
  const r = getActiveFilters().region;
  if (r === undefined) return data;
  return data.filter(d => r.includes(d.region));
}

function updateFARegionChart() {
  const chart = chartInstances['fa-chart-hbar'];
  if (!chart) return;
  const r = getActiveFilters().region;
  const allR = ['AMER','EMEA','APJ'];
  const regions = r === undefined ? allR : allR.filter(x => r.includes(x));
  chart.data.labels = regions;
  chart.data.datasets[0].data = regions.map(x => FA_REGION_BASE[x].actuals);
  chart.data.datasets[1].data = regions.map(x => FA_REGION_BASE[x].forecast);

let rawSortCol = null, rawSortDir = 1;
let filteredRawData = [...rawData];

function getFilteredRawData() {
  const active = getActiveFilters();
  const search = (document.getElementById('raw-search')?.value || '').toLowerCase();
  return rawData.filter(row => {
    if (active.region && !active.region.includes(row.region)) return false;
    if (active.subregion && !active.subregion.includes(row.subregion)) return false;
    if (active.partner && !active.partner.includes(row.partner)) return false;
    if (active.location && !active.location.includes(row.location)) return false;
    if (active.queue && !active.queue.includes(row.queue) && !active.queue.includes(row.br)) return false;
    if (active.fy && !active.fy.includes(row.fy)) return false;
    if (active.quarter && !active.quarter.includes(row.quarter)) return false;
    if (active.month && !active.month.includes(row.month)) return false;
    if (active.week && !active.week.includes(row.week)) return false;
    if (search) {
      const rowStr = Object.values(row).join(' ').toLowerCase();
      if (!rowStr.includes(search)) return false;
    }
    return true;
  });
}

function renderRawTable() {
  filteredRawData = getFilteredRawData();
  if (rawSortCol) {
    filteredRawData.sort((a,b) => {
      let av = a[rawSortCol], bv = b[rawSortCol];
      if (['weekNum','sr','fasu','tasu','fdsr'].includes(rawSortCol)) { av = Number(av); bv = Number(bv); }
      return av < bv ? -rawSortDir : av > bv ? rawSortDir : 0;
    });
  }
  const tbody = document.getElementById('raw-table-body');
  let html = '';
  filteredRawData.forEach((row, idx) => {
    const good = row.status === 'Within Tolerance';
    html += `<tr>
      <td class="row-num sticky-col">${idx+1}</td>
      <td>${row.region}</td><td>${row.subregion}</td><td>${row.partner}</td>
      <td>${row.location}</td><td>${row.queue}</td><td>${row.br}</td>
      <td>${row.fy}</td><td>${row.quarter}</td><td>${row.month}</td><td>${row.week}</td>
      <td>${row.sr.toLocaleString()}</td><td>${row.fasu.toLocaleString()}</td>
      <td>${row.tasu.toLocaleString()}</td><td>${row.fdsr.toLocaleString()}</td>
      <td>${row.lob}</td>
      <td><span class="badge ${good?'badge-good':'badge-high'}">${row.status}</span></td>
    </tr>`;
  });
  tbody.innerHTML = html;
  const total = document.getElementById('raw-row-count');
  if (total) total.innerText = `${filteredRawData.length} of ${rawData.length} rows`;
  const drTotal = document.getElementById('dr-total-records');
  if (drTotal) drTotal.innerText = filteredRawData.length.toLocaleString();
}

function sortRawTable(col) {
  const colKeyMap = { region:'region', subregion:'subregion', partner:'partner', location:'location', queue:'queue', busrep:'br', fy:'fy', quarter:'quarter', month:'month', week:'weekNum', sr:'sr', fasu:'fasu', tasu:'tasu', fdsr:'fdsr', lob:'lob' };
  const key = colKeyMap[col] || col;
  if (rawSortCol === key) rawSortDir *= -1;
  else { rawSortCol = key; rawSortDir = 1; }
  renderRawTable();
}

function filterRawTable() { renderRawTable(); }

// Base data matching Lovable screenshots
const WI_BASE = {

const WI_ASU_SHAPE  = [0.756,0.793,0.831,0.815,0.800,0.808,0.816,0.920,1.020,1.095,1.148,1.125];

  { key:'renewal',  label:'APOS Renewal Rate',    min:70,  max:100, step:0.5, val:89.5, fmt: v => v.toFixed(1)+'%' },
  { key:'growth',   label:'New Contracts Growth',  min:-20, max:50,  step:1,   val:8,    fmt: v => (v>=0?'+':'')+v+'%' },
  { key:'modifier', label:'Forecast Modifier',     min:-15, max:25,  step:1,   val:2,    fmt: v => (v>=0?'+':'')+v+'%' },
];

const WI_SAVED_SCENARIOS_DEFAULT = [
  { id:'conservative', label:'Conservative',     renewal:78, growth:-5,  modifier:-8, color:'#6b758f' },
  { id:'expected',     label:'Expected',          renewal:89.5, growth:8, modifier:2,  color:'#9d78f0' },
  { id:'aggressive',   label:'Aggressive',        renewal:94, growth:28,  modifier:10, color:'#22d472' },
  { id:'executive',    label:'Executive Stretch', renewal:97, growth:38,  modifier:15, color:'#4c7ef8' },
  { id:'worst',        label:'Worst Case',        renewal:72, growth:-18, modifier:-12,color:'#f06060' },
];

let wiState = { renewal:89.5, growth:8, modifier:2, unitsOverride:'' };
let wiSavedScenarios = WI_SAVED_SCENARIOS_DEFAULT.map(s => ({...s}));
let wiAuditLog = [];
let wiCharts = {};

function wiN(v) { return v>=1e6?(v/1e6).toFixed(2)+'M':v>=1e3?Math.round(v/1e3)+'K':Math.round(v).toString(); }
function wiNK(v) { return (v/1e3).toFixed(1); } // for chart labels in K
function wiD(v) { return (v>=0?'+':'')+wiN(v); }

function wiCompute(st) {
  const rRate  = st.renewal / 100;
  const baseR  = WI_BASE.baseRenewalRate / 100;
  const gMult  = 1 + (st.growth / 100);
  const mMult  = 1 + (st.modifier / 100);
  // calibrated so default inputs produce +8.6% ASU lift matching screenshot
  const asuMult = 1 + (st.growth/100)*0.8 + (st.modifier/100)*0.5 + (rRate/baseR - 1)*0.25;
  const whatifASU  = Math.round(WI_BASE.asu  * asuMult);
  const whatifSR   = Math.round(WI_BASE.sr   * (1 + (st.growth/100)*0.7 + (rRate/baseR-1)*0.2  + (st.modifier/100)*0.3));
  const whatifDisp = Math.round(WI_BASE.disp * (1 + (st.growth/100)*0.6 + (rRate/baseR-1)*0.15 + (st.modifier/100)*0.2));
  const renewedUnits   = st.unitsOverride ? (parseInt(st.unitsOverride)||WI_BASE.renewedUnits) : Math.round(WI_BASE.renewalOppQty * rRate);
  const newContracts   = Math.round(WI_BASE.newContracts * gMult);
  const aposRenewals   = Math.round(renewedUnits * 2840);    // $2840 per unit
  const newContractsVal= Math.round(newContracts * 2754);    // $2754 per unit
  return { whatifASU, whatifSR, whatifDisp, renewedUnits, newContracts, aposRenewals, newContractsVal,
           asuDelta: whatifASU - WI_BASE.asu, srDelta: whatifSR - WI_BASE.sr, dispDelta: whatifDisp - WI_BASE.disp,
           growthPct: (whatifASU / WI_BASE.asu - 1) * 100 };
}

function wiSliderMoved(key, val) {
  wiState[key] = val;
  const s = WI_SLIDERS.find(x => x.key === key);
  document.getElementById('wi-val-' + key).textContent = s.fmt(val);
  // Targeted updates — fast, no full re-render
  wiRenderKPIs();
  wiRenderImpact();
  wiRenderPipeline();
  wiRenderCharts(); // smart: updates existing chart data in-place
  wiAddAudit('Slider', `${s.label} → ${s.fmt(val)}`);
}

function wiUnitsInput(el) {
  // Strip everything except digits
  const digits = el.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
  if (!digits) {
    wiState.unitsOverride = '';
    el.value = '';
    wiRenderKPIs(); wiRenderImpact(); wiRenderPipeline(); wiRenderCharts();
    return;
  }
  const n = parseInt(digits, 10);
  // Format with Indian number system: 5,00,000
  const formatted = n.toLocaleString('en-IN');
  // Preserve cursor at end after reformat
  el.value = formatted;
  wiState.unitsOverride = n;
  wiRenderKPIs(); wiRenderImpact(); wiRenderPipeline(); wiRenderCharts();
  wiAddAudit('Override', `Renewed Units → ${formatted}`);
}

function wiRenderImpact() {
  const fc = wiCompute(wiState);
  const rows = [
    { icon:'ti-trending-up', label:'ASU increase',     val:wiD(fc.asuDelta),  pos:fc.asuDelta>=0 },
    { icon:'ti-headset',     label:'Service Requests',  val:wiD(fc.srDelta),   pos:fc.srDelta>=0 },
    { icon:'ti-truck',       label:'Dispatches',        val:wiD(fc.dispDelta), pos:fc.dispDelta>=0 },
  ];
  document.getElementById('wi-impact-rows').innerHTML = rows.map(r => `
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:8px;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
        <div style="width:28px;height:28px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;">
          <i class="ti ${r.icon}" style="color:#fff;font-size:13px;"></i>
        </div>
        <span style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);font-size:13px;font-weight:500;">${r.label}</span>
      </div>
      <span style="color:#fff;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:15px;font-weight:700;">${r.val}</span>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function wiRenderPipeline() {
  const fc = wiCompute(wiState);
  const nodes = [
    { label:'NEW CONTRACTS',    val:'$'+wiN(fc.newContractsVal), icon:'ti-file-plus',    grad:'linear-gradient(135deg,#3b6fd4,#5b8ff9)' },
    { label:'APOS RENEWALS',    val:'$'+wiN(fc.aposRenewals),   icon:'ti-refresh',       grad:'linear-gradient(135deg,#2d52e0,#4c7ef8)' },
    { label:'ASU FORECAST',     val:wiN(fc.whatifASU),           icon:'ti-chart-arrows',  grad:'linear-gradient(135deg,#0f9488,#14b8a6)' },
    { label:'SERVICE REQUESTS', val:wiN(fc.whatifSR),            icon:'ti-headset',       grad:'linear-gradient(135deg,#0f9488,#14b8a6)' },
    { label:'DISPATCHES',       val:wiN(fc.whatifDisp),          icon:'ti-truck',         grad:'linear-gradient(135deg,#1c4ed8,#3b82f6)' },
  ];
  const chevron = `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;padding:0 6px;"><i class="ti ti-chevron-right" style="font-size:18px;color:var(--text-3);"></i></div>`;
  document.getElementById('wi-pipeline').innerHTML = nodes.map((n, i) => `
    ${i > 0 ? chevron : ''}
    <div style="flex:1;min-width:140px;border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;background:${n.grad};position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:10px;right:12px;opacity:0.25;">
        <i class="ti ${n.icon}" style="font-size:28px;color:#fff;"></i>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase;">${n.label}</div>
      <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;">${n.val}</div>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function _wiChartData() {
  const fc = wiCompute(wiState);
  const ratio   = fc.whatifASU  / WI_BASE.asu;
  const srRatio = fc.whatifSR   / WI_BASE.sr;
  const dpRatio = fc.whatifDisp / WI_BASE.disp;
  return {
    asuBase: WI_ASU_SHAPE.map(s  => Math.round(WI_BASE.asu  * s  / 12)),
    asuAdj:  WI_ASU_SHAPE.map(s  => Math.round(WI_BASE.asu  * s  / 12 * ratio)),
    srBase:  WI_SR_SHAPE.map(s   => Math.round(WI_BASE.sr   * s  / 12 / 1e3)),
    srAdj:   WI_SR_SHAPE.map(s   => parseFloat((WI_BASE.sr  * s  / 12 / 1e3 * srRatio).toFixed(1))),
    dpBase:  WI_DISP_SHAPE.map(s => Math.round(WI_BASE.disp * s  / 12 / 1e3)),
    dpAdj:   WI_DISP_SHAPE.map(s => Math.round(WI_BASE.disp * s  / 12 / 1e3 * dpRatio)),
  };
}

function wiRenderCharts() {
  const d     = _wiChartData();
  const gridC = isDark ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.06)';
  const tickC = isDark ? '#6b758f' : '#9099be';
  const baseC = isDark ? '#4b5563' : '#9ca3af';

  // ── Smart update: if charts already exist, only update the What-If dataset ──
  if (wiCharts['wi-chart-asu'] && wiCharts['wi-chart-sr'] && wiCharts['wi-chart-dp']) {
    wiCharts['wi-chart-asu'].data.datasets[1].data = d.asuAdj;
    wiCharts['wi-chart-asu'].update('none');
    wiCharts['wi-chart-sr'].data.datasets[1].data = d.srAdj;
    wiCharts['wi-chart-sr'].update('none');
    wiCharts['wi-chart-dp'].data.datasets[1].data = d.dpAdj;
    wiCharts['wi-chart-dp'].update('none');
    return;
  }

  // ── First render: create charts from scratch ──
  function mkLine(id, baseD, adjD, adjColor) {
    const el = document.getElementById(id); if (!el) return;
    if (wiCharts[id]) wiCharts[id].destroy();
    wiCharts[id] = new Chart(el.getContext('2d'), {
      type: 'line',
      data: { labels: WI_MONTHS, datasets: [
        { label:'Base',    data:baseD, borderColor:baseC, backgroundColor:'transparent',
          borderWidth:1.5, pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:4, tension:0.45, fill:false },
        { label:'What-If', data:adjD,  borderColor:adjColor, backgroundColor:adjColor+'18',
          borderWidth:2.5, pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:5, tension:0.45, fill:'-1' },
      ]},
      options: {
        responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false,
        interaction:{ mode:'index', intersect:false },
        plugins:{
          legend:{ display:false },
          tooltip:{
            backgroundColor: isDark?'#111521':'#fff',
            borderColor:     isDark?'#1d2135':'#dde2f4',
            borderWidth:1,
            titleColor:      isDark?'#e9ecf7':'#0d1020',
            bodyColor:       isDark?'#6b758f':'#5a6280',
            callbacks:{ label: ctx => ` ${ctx.dataset.label}: ${ctx.formattedValue}` }
          }
        },
        scales:{
          x:{ grid:{color:gridC,drawTicks:false}, ticks:{color:tickC,font:{size:10},maxRotation:0}, border:{display:false} },
          y:{ grid:{color:gridC,drawTicks:false}, ticks:{color:tickC,font:{size:10}},               border:{display:false} }
        }
      }
    });
  }

  mkLine('wi-chart-asu', d.asuBase, d.asuAdj, '#3b82f6');
  mkLine('wi-chart-sr',  d.srBase,  d.srAdj,  '#06b6d4');

  // Dispatch — grouped bar
  const dpEl = document.getElementById('wi-chart-dp'); if (!dpEl) return;
  if (wiCharts['wi-chart-dp']) wiCharts['wi-chart-dp'].destroy();
  wiCharts['wi-chart-dp'] = new Chart(dpEl.getContext('2d'), {
    type:'bar',
    data:{ labels:WI_MONTHS, datasets:[
      { label:'Base',    data:d.dpBase, backgroundColor:isDark?'rgba(107,114,128,0.5)':'rgba(156,163,175,0.55)', borderRadius:2 },
      { label:'What-If', data:d.dpAdj,  backgroundColor:'#3b82f6cc', borderRadius:2 },
    ]},
    options:{
      responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false,
      plugins:{ legend:{ display:false } },
      scales:{
        x:{ grid:{display:false}, ticks:{color:tickC,font:{size:9},maxRotation:0}, border:{display:false} },
        y:{ grid:{color:gridC,drawTicks:false}, ticks:{color:tickC,font:{size:10}}, border:{display:false} }
      }
    }
  });
}

function wiRenderAIInsights() {
  const fc = wiCompute(wiState);
  const dPct = fc.growthPct.toFixed(1);
  const regions = ['EMEA','Americas','APJ'];
  const topRegion = regions[Math.abs(Math.round(wiState.renewal * 7)) % 3];
  const conf = Math.min(98, Math.round(72 + wiState.renewal/9 + wiState.growth/8));
  document.getElementById('wi-ai-insights').innerHTML = `
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px;padding:10px;background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;border-left:2px solid var(--blue);">
      <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-1);margin-bottom:4px;">Scenario Analysis</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;line-height:1.7;">At <strong style="color:var(--text-1)">${wiState.renewal.toFixed(1)}%</strong> renewal rate with <strong style="color:var(--text-1)">${wiState.growth>=0?'+':''}${wiState.growth}%</strong> contracts growth, ASU shifts by <strong style="color:${dPct>=0?'var(--green)':'var(--red)'};">${dPct>=0?'+':''}${dPct}%</strong> vs baseline.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px;padding:10px;background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;border-left:2px solid var(--purple);">
      <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-1);margin-bottom:4px;">Service Demand Signal</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;line-height:1.7;">Dispatch forecast reaches <strong style="color:var(--text-1)">${wiN(fc.whatifDisp)}</strong> units with <strong style="color:var(--text-1)">${wiN(fc.whatifSR)}</strong> service requests projected. Confidence: <strong style="color:var(--text-1)">${conf}%</strong>.</div>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:10px;background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;border-left:2px solid var(--green);">
      <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-1);margin-bottom:4px;">Regional Opportunity</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;line-height:1.7;"><strong style="color:var(--text-1)">${topRegion}</strong> shows the highest renewal uplift leverage. Targeting that region adds the most ASU delta per percentage point.</div>
    </div>`;
}

function wiRenderScenarios() {
  document.getElementById('wi-scenario-list').innerHTML = wiSavedScenarios.map(s => `
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color 0.15s;"
      onmouseenter="this.style.borderColor='${s.color}'" onmouseleave="this.style.borderColor='var(--border)'"
      onclick="wiLoadScenario('${s.id}')">
      <div style="width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:${s.color};flex-shrink:0;"></div>
      <span style="flex:1;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-1);font-weight:600;">${s.label}</span>
      <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);font-family:var(--font-mono);">R:${s.renewal}% G:${s.growth>=0?'+':''}${s.growth}%</span>
      <button onclick="wiDeleteScenario(event,'${s.id}')" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-3);padding:2px;"><i class="ti ti-trash" style="font-size:12px;"></i></button>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function wiLoadScenario(id) {
  const s = wiSavedScenarios.find(x => x.id === id); if (!s) return;
  ['renewal','growth','modifier'].forEach(k => { if (s[k]!==undefined) wiState[k]=s[k]; });
  wiRenderSliders(); wiRenderAll();
  wiAddAudit('Scenario', `Loaded: ${s.label}`);
}

function wiSaveScenario() {
  const id = 'custom_' + Date.now();
  wiSavedScenarios.push({ id, label:'Custom '+(wiSavedScenarios.length+1),
    renewal:wiState.renewal, growth:wiState.growth, modifier:wiState.modifier, color:'#6b758f' });
  wiRenderScenarios(); wiAddAudit('Scenario', 'Saved scenario');
}

function wiDeleteScenario(e, id) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  wiSavedScenarios = wiSavedScenarios.filter(s => s.id !== id);
  wiRenderScenarios();
}

function wiRenderPublishReadiness() {
  const conf = Math.min(99, Math.round(74 + wiState.renewal/9 + wiState.growth/12));
  const fc = wiCompute(wiState);
  const items = [
    { l:'Quality Score',    v:conf+'%',             color:'var(--green)' },
    { l:'Approval Status',  v:'Pending',             color:'var(--amber)' },
    { l:'Final ASU',        v:wiN(fc.whatifASU),     color:'var(--blue)' },
    { l:'Final Dispatches', v:wiN(fc.whatifDisp),    color:'var(--purple)' },
  ];
  document.getElementById('wi-publish-readiness').innerHTML = `
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;">
      ${items.map(x => `
        <div style="padding:10px;background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);">
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);margin-bottom:4px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;">${x.l}</div>
          <div style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:${x.color};">${x.v}</div>
        </div>`).join('')}
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--surface);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;margin-bottom:6px;">
        <span style="color:var(--text-2);">Publish Readiness</span>
        <span style="font-family:var(--font-mono);font-weight:700;color:var(--text-1);">${conf}%</span>
      </div>
      <div style="height:6px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="height:100%;width:${conf}%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--blue),var(--green));border-radius:3px;transition:width 0.4s;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
}

function wiHandlePublish() {
  wiAddAudit('Publish', 'Forecast published to plan system');
  const b = document.getElementById('wi-pub-btn');
  b.style.background = 'var(--green)'; b.style.color = '#000';
  b.innerHTML = '<i class="ti ti-check"></i> Published!';
  setTimeout(() => {
    b.style.background = 'var(--accent)'; b.style.color = '#fff';
    b.innerHTML = '<i class="ti ti-rocket"></i> Publish';
  }, 2500);
}

function wiAddAudit(action, detail) {
  const now = new Date();
  wiAuditLog.unshift({ action, detail, time: now.toLocaleTimeString() });
  if (wiAuditLog.length > 50) wiAuditLog.pop();
  wiRenderAudit();
}

function wiRenderAudit() {
  const el = document.getElementById('wi-audit-log'); if (!el) return;
  el.innerHTML = wiAuditLog.slice(0,15).map(a => `
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);">
      <div style="width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--blue-dim);border:1px solid rgba(76,126,248,0.2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);flex-shrink:0;">AR</div>
      <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
          <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-1);">${a.action}</span>
          <span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-3);font-family:var(--font-mono);">${a.time}</span>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-2);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${a.detail}</div>
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function wiExportCSV() {
  alert('CSV export initiated for current scenario comparison.');
}

function wiRenderAll() {
  wiRenderKPIs();
  wiRenderImpact();
  wiRenderPipeline();
  wiRenderCharts();
  wiRenderAIInsights();
  wiRenderScenarios();
  wiRenderPublishReadiness();
  wiRenderAudit();
}

function wiInit() {
  wiRenderSliders();
  wiAddAudit('Session', 'What-If module loaded');
  wiAddAudit('Filter', 'FY 2026 · Q2 · All Regions');
  setTimeout(wiRenderAll, 80);
}

// =========================================================

function setRefreshStamp() {
  const now = new Date();
  const s = `Refreshed ${now.toLocaleTimeString([], {hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}`;
  const el = document.getElementById('refresh-stamp');
  const hel = document.getElementById('home-refresh-stamp');
  if (el) el.innerText = s;
  if (hel) hel.innerText = s;
}
setRefreshStamp();
setInterval(setRefreshStamp, 60000);
</script>
</body>
</html>

Brandon Adams Team]:::process TechASU(Tech ASUs):::people SRForecast[Service Request Forecast]:::process Cube2{Data Cube}:::cube JeffDoug2(Jeff & Doug):::people DispPub[Dispatch Forecast Publish]:::process SRPub[Service Request Forecast Publish]:::process Reporting([Excel Reporting]):::report %% Connections FrankTeam --> Hadoop Hadoop --> Renewals Renewals --> NewContracts NewContracts --> Sales Renewals --> APOS POS --> APOS Renewals --> Scripts Renewals --> Cube1 JeffDoug1 -.-> Cube1 Cube1 --> ASUForecast ASUForecast --> DispForecast ASUForecast --> SRForecast DispActuals --> DispForecast FieldASU --> DispForecast SRActuals --> SRForecast TechASU --> SRForecast DispForecast --> Cube2 SRForecast --> Cube2 JeffDoug2 -.-> Cube2 Cube2 --> DispPub Cube2 --> SRPub DispPub --> Reporting SRPub --> Reporting

Key Stakeholders

  • Frank Colemans Team Data Ingestion
  • Sales & POS Teams Contracts
  • Jeff & Doug Data Cubes / Modeling
  • Frank Goldmans Team Dispatch Actuals
  • Brandon Adams Team SR Actuals

ASU Conversion Note

ASUs act primarily as a conversion process. It combines the new contacts forecast, the renewals forecast, and factors in the decline that comes through in the historical data. Tech ASU forecasts are subsequently utilized for AOP by multiple downstream teams.
